plugins.name: everything-claude-code
plugins.description: The complete Claude Code plugin — 36 agents, 128 skills, 69 commands. Consolidates all official Anthropic plugins (pr-review-toolkit, feature-dev, commit-commands, hookify, code-simplifier, security-guidance, frontend-design) into one package.
